Package org.eventb.internal.ui

Class EventBSharedColor

java.lang.Object
org.eventb.internal.ui.EventBSharedColor
public class EventBSharedColor extends Object
Provides Colors management facilities. This class is used in order to prevent from allocating the same Color several times, by taking advantage of the ColorManager.

    • EventBSharedColor

      private EventBSharedColor()

  • Method Details

    • getColor

      public static org.eclipse.swt.graphics.Color getColor(org.eclipse.swt.graphics.RGB rgb)
      Returns a Color from a given RGB. This method prevents from allocating the same Color several times.
      Parameters:
      rgb - RGB color.
      Returns:
      the converted color.

    • getSystemColor

      public static org.eclipse.swt.graphics.Color getSystemColor(int id)
      Returns a System Color. This method uses system colors, which prevents from allocating the same Color several times.
      Parameters:
      id - the integer identifier of the system color.
      Returns:
      the converted color.
      See Also:
      • Display.getSystemColor(int)
